title: Smiley Sans for Caxton
body:
# Smiley Sans for Caxton Mod
- A simple resource pack that uses [Caxton](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) to replace the original fonts with Smiley Sans.
# Precautions
- Caxton is required to load this resource pack correctly;
- The original font does not include _italics_, and **bold** is not obvious.
# External Resources
- Smiley Sans: [https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans](https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans)


<details>
<summary>中文</summary>

# 用于Caxton的得意黑字体
- 一个简单的资源包，使用Caxton模组将原版字体替换为得意黑字体
# 注意事项
- 需要安装Caxton模组才可以正确载入；
- 原版字体并不包含斜体，粗体不明显。
# 外部资源
- Smiley Sans: [https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans](https://github.com/atelier-anchor/smiley-sans)

</details>
